title: GFP-mCherry-LC3B Flux Analysis by FACS
author: Devin M. Fuller
materials: Prepare reagents for transfection with either lipofectamine 3000 or dharmafect.
Data analysis was performed using the FlowJo software.

steps.title: Seed 50,000 WT or GFP-mCherry-LC3B KI...
steps.instruction: Seed 50,000 WT or GFP-mCherry-LC3B KI H4 cells in each chamber of a 6-well treated tissue culture plate. Maintain cells in DMEM + 10% fetal bovine serum (FBS) + 1x penicillin and streptomycin.

steps.title: Grow for 1 day until cells are ~60-70% confluent
steps.instruction: Grow for 1 day until cells are ~60-70% confluent

steps.title: If cells do not need to...
steps.instruction: If cells do not need to be transfected, skip to autophagy induction and cell collection

steps.title: Wash cells into DMEM + 10%...
steps.instruction: Wash cells into DMEM + 10% FBS without antibiotic prior to transfection (at 60-70% confluence).

steps.title: After 00:10:00 , dispense 250 µL...
steps.instruction: After 00:10:00 , dispense 250 µL of combined mixture into each well to be transfected.

steps.title: Return plates to incubator, and incubate...
steps.instruction: Return plates to incubator, and incubate for 1-3 days (minimum of 2 days for siRNA KD) before conducting experiment

steps.title: Replace the media with Earle’s Balanced...
steps.instruction: Replace the media with Earle’s Balanced Salt Solution (EBSS) to start the experiment.

steps.title: For transfected plasmids, each well requires...
steps.instruction: For transfected plasmids, each well requires 1 µg of target DNA construct. Prepare a master mix consisting of 1 µg of DNA, 125 µL of opti-mem low serum medium, and 2 µL of P3000 reagent per well. Prepare an additional mix consisting of 125 µL of opti-mem and 2 µL of lipofectamine 3000 per well. Combine the DNA + P3000 and lipofectamine solutions together, and allow to incubate for 00:10:00 at room temperature.

steps.title: For siRNA, transfect a final concentration...
steps.instruction: For siRNA, transfect a final concentration of 25 nanomolar (nM) of the indicated siRNA. Prepare a master mix consisting of siRNA and 125 µL of opti-mem low serum medium per well. Prepare an additional mix consisting of 125 µL of opti-mem and 4 µL of Dharmafect (Horizon Discovery) per well. Combine the DNA and dharmafect solutions together, and allow to incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Remove media and add 200 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Remove media and add 200 µL of 0.05% trypsin to each wells for 00:03:00

steps.title: Add 2 mL of DMEM to...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL of DMEM to each well, transfer to 15 mL conical tubes, and centrifuge for 500 x g, °C, 2 minutes .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and resuspend thoroughly...
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and resuspend thoroughly in appropriate FACS buffer (we used 1x PBS supplemented with 1x FBS), pipetting up and down at least five times. Transfer to round bottom tube with cell strainer to further ensure cell singlets.

steps.title: At this point, we brought the...
steps.instruction: At this point, we brought the samples to a core facility for analysis. If using a core, consult with the technician prior to the experiment. The non-labeled WT sample was used as a negative control. The untreated or siControl sample was used as a positive control and should show a high ratio between the red and green fluorophores.
